pico.intervention_or_exposure: optimal power load training optimal load for power training at optimal load power load optimal resistance for power load that maximizes power
pico.outcomes: power output peak power mean power velocity force jump performance sprint performance
pico.study_design_preference: RCT / systematic review / meta-analysis / clinical trial

searches.query: (("optimal power load"[Title/Abstract] OR "maximal power load"[Title/Abstract] OR "optimal load for power"[Title/Abstract] OR "power load training"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("training"[Title/Abstract] OR "exercise"[Title/Abstract] OR "sport"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("power output"[Title/Abstract] OR "peak power"[Title/Abstract] OR "mean power"[Title/Abstract])) AND "humans"[MeSH Terms] NOT ("animal"[Title/Abstract] OR "rat"[Title/Abstract] OR "mouse"[Title/Abstract] OR "cell"[Title/Abstract] OR "in vitro"[Title/Abstract]) AND (randomized controlled trial[Publication Type] OR controlled clinical trial[Publication Type] OR comparative study[Publication Type])
